posts.title: Parents shouldn’t have to sue to get schools to comply with settled law. Children are NOT school property. America First Legal Just Sued Fairfax County Public Schools for its Unconstitutional Policy directing staff to facilitate students’ “gender transitions” without parents’ knowledge or consent...

quotedTweet.content: 🚨BREAKING — AFL just sued Fairfax County Public Schools for its unconstitutional policy directing staff to facilitate students’ “gender transitions” without parents’ knowledge or consent.

twitter.content:
The Supreme Court, 9th Circuit, and 3rd Circuit have all found policies like that of Fairfax County Public Schools to be unconstitutional under the 1st and 14th Amendments.

Parents shouldn’t have to sue to get schools to comply with well-settled law, but here we are.
